company.what_they_do: RedCentric (redcentric.site) is a recruitment and staffing agency offering professional recruitment and staffing solutions on a worldwide basis, with a focus on strategic hiring for long-term business growth. This is a distinct, separate entity from the unrelated UK managed IT services firm Redcentric PLC (redcentricplc.com), which is a publicly listed managed service provider.
raw_notes: Tagline: 'Professional Recruitment & Staffing Solutions Worldwide' and 'Strategic hiring for long-term business growth'
Website is minimal — only the homepage returned substantive content; no 'About', 'Team', or 'Services' sub-pages were indexed in search results
The domain is redcentric.site (a .site TLD), clearly separate from redcentricplc.com
No founding date, headcount, geographic focus beyond 'Worldwide', or named leadership found on the site
No press coverage, news, or third-party references to redcentric.site specifically were found — it appears to be a small or newly established agency with minimal web footprint
IMPORTANT: redcentric.com is an unrelated personal art/portfolio site (© 2007-2026 REDCENTRIC.COM). redcentricplc.com is the large UK IT managed services firm. Neither is the signup entity.
